mano_cua.result_summary: Sky布局模式在此版本的d3-org-chart中不存在。源码分析显示layoutBindings仅支持4种布局:left/top/bottom/right。Swap Layouts按钮代码为chart.layout(['right','bottom','left','top'][index++%4])。d3-org-chart.js全文无'sky'关键词。另外图表因d3.csv API不兼容和build文件路径问题无法渲染
mano_cua.last_reasoning: d3-org-chart library layoutBindings only contains 4 layouts: left, top, bottom, right. No 'sky' layout exists. Swap Layouts button cycles through ['right','bottom','left','top']. Source code search for 'sky' in d3-org-chart.js returned 0 results. Chart also failed to render due to d3.csv API incompatibility (TypeError: d3.csv is not a function) and build file 404 error.
